channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.description: A threat actor named Mr_Rot13 has been attributed to the exploitation of a recently disclosed critical cPanel flaw to deploy a backdoor codenamed Filemanager on compromised environments. The attack ex...

item.title: How Bitcoin Outperformed ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL During 2025-2026 Market Stress
item.description: SOL fell the furthest at 71.6%, from $238 to $67, but also bounced the hardest, recovering 38% from its bottom....

item.title: Your Purple Team Isn't Purple — It's Just Red and Blue in the Same Room

item.title: Fake OpenAI Privacy Filter Repo Hits #1 on Hugging Face, Draws 244K Downloads

item.title: Ollama Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability Allows Remote Process Memory Leak
